case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC. VS. PETER CHOW ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT CHOW, PETER DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-14-2020

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOW, PETER $3,665.53 PRINCIPAL, $238.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,903.53, SEE SCANNED DOC
